case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. DAVID JEFFERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2021
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200032369)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
